#  About Budget Changes 
Table of Contents 
##  Prerequisites 
#####  Important
  * The Budget Changes feature requires any existing Budget Modifications data to be migrated to a new format. It also requires API endpoint updates for any companies using custom integrations. For important information about the migration process and API endpoint update requirements, see [Common Questions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/budget-common_questions).
